modify.title: Swarm Settings
modify.description: Configure swarm settings for your service.
modify.alert: Changing settings such as placements may cause the logs/monitoring, backups and other features to be unavailable.

healthCheck.label: Health Check
healthCheck.doc: Configure HEALTHCHECK to test a container's health. Determines if a container is healthy by running a command inside the container. Test, Interval, Timeout, StartPeriod, and Retries control health monitoring.

restartPolicy.label: Restart Policy
restartPolicy.doc: Configure the restart policy for containers in the service. Condition (none, on-failure, any), Delay (nanoseconds between restarts), MaxAttempts, and Window control restart behavior.

placement.label: Placement
placement.doc: Control which nodes service tasks can be scheduled on. Constraints (node.id==xyz), Preferences (spread.node.labels.zone), MaxReplicas, and Platforms specify task placement rules.

updateConfig.label: Update Config
updateConfig.doc: Configure how the service should be updated. Parallelism (tasks updated simultaneously), Delay, FailureAction (pause, continue, rollback), Monitor, MaxFailureRatio, and Order (stop-first, start-first) control updates.

rollbackConfig.label: Rollback Config
rollbackConfig.doc: Configure automated rollback on update failure. Uses same parameters as UpdateConfig: Parallelism, Delay, FailureAction, Monitor, MaxFailureRatio, and Order.

mode.label: Mode
mode.doc: Set service mode to either 'Replicated' with a specified number of tasks (Replicas), or 'Global' (one task per node).

network.label: Network
network.doc: Attach the service to one or more networks. Specify the network name (Target) and optional network aliases for service discovery.

labels.label: Labels
labels.doc: Add metadata to services using labels. Labels are key-value pairs (e.g., com.example.foo=bar) for organizing and filtering services.

stopGracePeriod.label: Stop Grace Period
stopGracePeriod.doc: Time to wait before forcefully killing a container. Specified in nanoseconds (e.g., 10000000000 = 10 seconds). Allows containers to shutdown gracefully.

endpointSpec.label: Endpoint Spec
endpointSpec.doc: Configure endpoint mode for service discovery. Mode 'vip' (virtual IP - default) uses a single virtual IP. Mode 'dnsrr' (DNS round-robin) returns DNS entries for all tasks.

mode.modeTypeDesc: Choose between replicated or global service mode

healthCheck.testCommandsDesc: Command to run for health check (e.g., ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -f http://localhost:3000/health"])
healthCheck.intervalDesc: Time between health checks (e.g., 10000000000 for 10 seconds)
healthCheck.timeoutDesc: Maximum time to wait for health check response
healthCheck.startPeriodDesc: Initial grace period before health checks begin
healthCheck.retriesDesc: Number of consecutive failures needed to consider container unhealthy

restartPolicy.windowDesc: Time window to evaluate restart policy

placement.maxReplicasDesc: Maximum number of replicas per node

updateConfig.parallelismDesc: Number of tasks to update simultaneously
updateConfig.monitorDesc: Duration to monitor for failure after update

rollbackConfig.parallelismDesc: Number of tasks to rollback simultaneously
rollbackConfig.monitorDesc: Duration to monitor for failure after rollback

network.sectionDesc: Configure network attachments for your service
network.networkNameDesc: The name of the network to attach to

labels.sectionDesc: Add key-value labels to your service

stopGrace.label: Stop Grace Period (nanoseconds)
stopGrace.desc: Time to wait before forcefully killing the container
